privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 lacks a 'parcel_acres' column in the 'parcels' table, containing only 'shape_area'. An agent strictly following the prompt's instruction to use 'parcel_acres * 43560' will encounter a KeyError and must adapt. The expected output files are: 1) /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/non_conforming_parcels.csv (must contain parcel_id, zone_id, total_building_sqft, parcel_sqft, built_far, max_far, excess_sqft), 2) /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_non_conformance_counts.csv, and 3) /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/far_compliance_scatter.png.
